sourceMovie.title: Vengeance
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Vengeance (2022) stuck because it commits to its comedy premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. B.J. Novak's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The comedy and mystery blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Foul Play
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Vengeance worked for you, Foul Play (1978) is a strong next pick. The two films share comedy and mystery throughlines and comic timing and sharper banter, even though the stories go in different directions.

recommendations.title: Mystic River
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Vengeance worked for you, Mystic River (2003) is a strong next pick. The two films share mystery and thriller throughlines and unease that lingers after the credits, even though the stories go in different directions.

faq.question: What should I watch after Vengeance?
faq.answer: Try Foul Play, Mystic River, The Name of the Rose—each shares DNA with Vengeance while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Vengeance?
faq.answer: Vengeance (2022) is best described as Comedy, Mystery, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Vengeance worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
